---
title: "progress-report-srav26-isu"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(Lahman)
```

```{r}
tables[[1]] %>% head()
tables[[2]] %>% head()
```

```{r}
data <- tables[[1]]

head(data)
colnames(data)
```

```{r}
data <- tables[[1]]

# Fix column names
colnames(data) <- data[1, ]
data <- data[-1, ]

# Clean dataset
data_clean <- data %>%
  select(Name, Votes, `%vote`)

head(data_clean)
```

```{r}

hof <- HallOfFame

head(hof)
```


```{r}

```

```{r}

```


```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
